case_title: PENG, CHIA-CHEN VS MOSKOWITZ, RONALD D.

docket_entries.description: AUTO ACCIDENT CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $2,500.00 FILED BY PENG, CHIA-CHEN AS TO DEFENDANT MOSKOWITZ, RONALD D. ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR NOV-14-1994 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT 00
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION NOV-14-1994, CONTINUANCE ORDERED PER REQUEST TO DEC-05-1994 AT 01:30 PM IN DEPT 07

PARTIES WAIVE SERVICE ON PLAINTIFF'S CLAIM. THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, CHIA-CHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSKOWITZ, RONALD D. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
CASE_TRANSFERRED TO SUPERIOR COURT, APPELLATE NUMBER 23722, RECORD AND EXHIBITS TRANSFERRED
ACKNOWLEDGMENT OF SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT AS TO DEFENDANT MOSKOWITZ, RONALD D.
NOTICE OF APPEAL FILED BY DEFENDANT MOSKOWITZ, RONALD D.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING AMENDED JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF PENG, CHIA-CHEN RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT MOSKOWITZ, RONALD D. $2,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $15.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $2,515.00, JUDGMENT ENTERED IN SCA 23722 ON 5/18/95. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT TO PENG, CHIA-CHEN RETURNED, MOVED LEFT NO ADDRESS
